validations.name: source_inputs_confirmed
validations.evidence: All 4 governed source inputs present, checksums confirmed unmodified against 51.1R-recorded values.

validations.name: adapter_created_via_shell
validations.evidence: scripts/pios/42.23/execlens_wowchain_adapter.py created via cat <<'EOF' heredoc. No Write() abstraction used.

validations.name: adapter_reads_42_22_only
validations.evidence: Adapter opens docs/pios/42.22/sample_runtime_output.json as sole data source. No import of 42.2 or 42.7 modules.

validations.name: adapter_validates_closed_set
validations.evidence: GOVERNED_CLOSED_SET = {high, medium, low, none}. Any record with emphasis outside this set triggers fail-closed (exit 1).

validations.name: static_mapping_verbatim_from_51_1
validations.evidence: RENDERING_MAP = {high: RENDER_RED, medium: RENDER_AMBER, low: RENDER_NEUTRAL, none: RENDER_NONE}. Verbatim from 51.1 rendering_spec.md static mapping table.

validations.name: adapter_fail_closed_defined
validations.evidence: 5 fail-closed triggers defined: source missing, exposure_records absent, emphasis absent, emphasis out-of-set, mapping ambiguity. All call fail_closed() which exits 1.

validations.name: adapter_test_execution_pass
validations.evidence: python3 scripts/pios/42.23/execlens_wowchain_adapter.py executed. Output: 5 records, all emphasis=none→RENDER_NONE, record_count=5, exit 0. No fail-closed triggers fired.

validations.name: adapter_wow_chain_flag_set
validations.evidence: Adapter output carries wow_chain=true. TopologyPanel.js detects this to switch render path.

validations.name: execlens_js_adapter_42_7_removed
validations.evidence: ADAPTER_42_7 constant removed from pages/api/execlens.js. ADAPTER_42_23 added. topology route calls ADAPTER_42_23.

validations.name: execlens_js_42_4_42_6_unchanged
validations.evidence: ADAPTER_42_4 and ADAPTER_42_6 constants and their route handlers are unchanged. Only topology route modified.

validations.name: topology_panel_wow_chain_path_added
validations.evidence: ExposureNodeRow component and RENDER_TOKEN_CLASS map added. WOW chain render path: if topology.wow_chain === true. Legacy render path retained.

validations.name: topology_panel_metadata_updated
validations.evidence: WOW chain metadata text: 'source: 42.22 WOW chain · governed emphasis exposure · 51.1 rendering spec'.

validations.name: no_upstream_artifacts_modified
validations.evidence: 42.22, 51.1, 51.1R, 43.x, 44.x artifacts unmodified. file_changes.json confirms unchanged checksums for all source inputs.

validations.name: no_synthetic_data_introduced
validations.evidence: Adapter reads only from 42.22 runtime-exposed artifacts. No values invented. Null on missing fields, fail-closed on absent required fields.

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
validations.evidence: Adapter test execution: 5 records, all valid, exit 0. No fail-closed conditions triggered.
